title: selaginella torricelliana
intro: Selaginella torricelliana, also known as the mountain club moss, is a species of evergreen plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is used to treat ailments such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the Selaginella torricelliana plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
